heading: Proposals for projects previously authorized; waiver of requirements; approval; negotiation of contract
label: 422f Proposals for projects previously authorized; waiver of requirements; approval; negotiation of contract
text: Any proposal with respect to the construction of a project which has theretofore been authorized for construction under the Federal reclamation laws shall be made in like manner as a proposal under , but the Secretary may waive such requirements of subsections (a) and (b) of as he finds to be duplicative of, or rendered unnecessary or impossible by, action already taken by the United States. Upon approval of any such proposal by the Secretary he may negotiate and execute a contract which conforms, as nearly as may be, to the provisions of .section 422d of this titlesection 422d of this titlesection 422e of this title
notes: References in TextThe Federal reclamation laws, referred to in text, are defined in .section 422b of this title
